name: Frank's Eggplant Siciliano
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a 10 x 14 glass baking pan with olive oil on the sides and bottom.
2. Pour 1 cup of marinara sauce into the pan and spread it evenly.
3. Place a layer of sliced eggplant in the pan, working it into the sauce.
4. Spread another half-cup or so of sauce to cover the eggplant.
5. Sprinkle Italian sausage, then mozzarella, then Romano cheese on top.
6. Continue sprinkling garlic powder, basil leaves, and oregano evenly.
7. Pour another cup of sauce over the eggplant, spreading it around.
8. Add another layer of sliced eggplant and repeat steps 4-7 until all ingredients are used.
9. Top off with a heavy layer of mozzarella.
10. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
11. Season with black pepper.
12. Cover the dish tightly with heavy-duty aluminum foil.
13. Bake for about an hour in the upper third of the oven, or until the eggplant is soft and tender.
14. Let cool for 20 minutes before serving.
